en: one-minute English in this one-minute lesson we are going to have a look at
some different meanings for put on put on can mean to dress or wear something

en: we can use put on for clothes glasses jewelry and other accessories for
ko: 옷, 안경, 보석, 기타 액세서리에 put on을 사용할 수 있어요.

en: example when I leave the house I put on my shoes another meaning of put on can
ko: 예를 들어, 집을 나갈 때 신발을 신어요. put on의 또 다른 의미는

en: be to add or gain weight for example I eat junk food every day so I put on
ko: 체중이 늘다일 수도 있어요. 예를 들어, 매일 정크푸드를 먹으니까 살이 쪘어요.

en: weight put on also means to start some kind of equipment or device for example
ko: put on은 어떤 장비나 기기를 켜다는 뜻도 있어요. 예를 들어,
